title: Stringly-typed session messages (serde_json::Value) instead of typed Message struct
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Type Safety / Architectural Alignment
Location: src/tui/app.rs:274 session_messages: Vec<serde_json::Value>; src/tui/app.rs:37 TuiSession.messages: Vec<serde_json::Value>; src/acp.rs:579
Violation: Conversation history stored as untyped serde_json::Value across TUI, session-save format, and ACP server. Every consumer does m.get(role).and_then(|r| r.as_str()).unwrap_or(?) (22+ sites). ACP round-trips Value -> ChatMessage via serde_json::from_value and silently drops malformed messages with .ok(). Core domain depends on serialization library — DIP violation.
Mandated Refactor: pub struct Message { role: Role, content: Content, tool_calls, tool_call_id }. Reserve serde_json::Value for provider adapter boundary. Consolidate on existing proxy::ChatMessage.
